title: achillea mucronulata
intro: Achillea mucronulata, also known as the yarrow or Chinese yarrow, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to China and parts of Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The health benefits of Achillea mucronulata include its use in treating fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Achillea mucronulata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the dried flowers and leaves in hot water or a solvent, and are often used in traditional Chinese medicine.
